stemHtml: How should an operator prevent aircraft corrosion, when their primary operations are low-level missions over the ocean?

options.a: Wash the aircraft frequently and thoroughly, including the engines.
options.b: Change the engine oil and hydraulic fluid more frequently than normal.
options.c: Increase their cruising speed to minimise salt build up.
options.d: Change their whole fleet of aircraft to ones more suited to the missions.
